text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature hasn't arrived in time for training
today. In fact, she usually arrives a little early.
Worried, I look around the academy for her.

I find her in front of a tree stump. This is a
popular spot among the students to shout out
their pent-up feelings.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...No one is around.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Why the hell did I say that?! Stupid Naturrre!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Declaring war against a main character?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Know your place, you stupid, insignificant
BACKGROUND EXTRAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're not even a star yet... Stupid stupid
STUUUPIIID!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's no good. I don't feel any better.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Why are you he—agh!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Is it time for training already?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Arrrghhh... Ah, wait, didn't something like this
happen before?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, why do you always show up to see my most
embarrassing moments?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
You can show me even your most embarrassing
moments.

You can show me even your most embarrassing
moments.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Urrrgh... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna run! I'm scared to run!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Waaaaahhh!

Nice Nature, usually so calm and collected, allows
herself to cry like a child.

Later, when she has calmed down, she starts
talking about her feelings.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You know how I'm in really good shape right now?
I think I'm in my best condition ever.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten stronger and gained confidence too.
I'm ready to fight my competition head-on.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... what if I lose even then?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What if my strongest self still doesn't shine?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I'm scared.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everything I've done will be meaningless if I lose
here.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
"I wasn't really trying." "I still have potential."
"That wasn't everything I have."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've been using excuses like those to protect
myself, but... I can't do that anymore!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Of course I am! I'm dead serious about this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But what if I still lose? Will I go back to my old,
complacent self? I don't want that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm scared. So, so scared...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry, but I don't think I can just believe that
today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Because... I know I can't live up to those
expectations. I don't even think I can take
another step forward.
choice_data_list: Can I still believe in you anyway?
Can I still believe in you anyway?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
In what? What do I have that makes you believe
in me?
choice_data_list: I have all the proof I need right here.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: These are...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's an... origami... trophy? It looks kinda floppy.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I can't believe you made another. Hehe, this
one's floppy too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Do you have a floppy trophy for me today?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Your... trophies...

In my hand, I have early attempts at the
handmade trophies I've been giving to Nice
Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The one for the Kokura Kinen, Kikuka Sho, Arima
Kinen, autumn Tenno Sho, and... so many more...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I never realized you made so many...
choice_data_list: Well, yeah. I've always believed in you.
Well, yeah. I've always believed in you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I've really accomplished so much so far...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You could've given up on me. Why did you keep
believing in me?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Y-you what? What, what did you... What did you
just say?

I tell this hard-working girl who has never given
up on winning that, as her trainer, I am
wholeheartedly cheering her on.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I figured that was the case. But still...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Um... sorry. Maybe I got a bit too tense.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess I just realized how intimidating it is to
declare that I'm going to win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I guess Teio is always fighting this pressure.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's impressive, but... I'm not backing down
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: After all, I have someone that likes me now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Everyone from the Shopping District
text_block_list.text: Natieeee! You got this!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Keep it up, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I have another very important reason why I want
to win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I can't be whining all the time anymore.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Being a trainer must be tough. You have to take
care of the emotional side of things too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I guess it's all part of the job, though.
choice_data_list: My job is to make you shine.
My job is to make you shine.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...So you're just doing this 'cause it's your job,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Kiddiiing! Forget what I just said!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
We're supposed to be training, right? I-I'll go
change right away!

She seems to have regained her energy. Now it's
time to move forward... together!
